items.name: White Furret Pilot (Chibi)
items.description:
Meet the White Furret Pilot, the cutest and most adventurous plushie you've ever laid eyes on! This playful little companion is ready to take you on a journey through the stars with its adorable pilot glasses and pristine white fur. With its big, sparkling eyes, it will whisk you away on intergalactic adventures and have you dreaming of discovering new worlds. Perfect for space exploration enthusiasts, this plushie is as soft as it is cuddly. Adopt the White Furret Pilot today and embark on exciting adventures together! 🚀✨

Follow me on Twitter #0V3RDRIVE_Dev

You can check out my other items here! https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=1&CreatorName=Legion%20of%20UGC&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1
